query: ALTER TABLE leads ADD COLUMN address text, ADD COLUMN businessType enum('cafe','restaurant','grocery','hotel','caterer','other'), ADD COLUMN leadSource enum('instagram','referral','website','walk_in','cold_call','other'), ADD COLUMN potentialValue enum('low','medium','high'), ADD COLUMN estimatedWeeklyOrder varchar(100), ADD COLUMN productsInterested text, ADD COLUMN assignedTo varchar(255), ADD COLUMN lastContactDate timestamp NULL, ADD COLUMN nextFollowUpDate timestamp NULL, ADD COLUMN notes text, ADD COLUMN lostReason enum('price_too_high','no_response','not_interested','already_has_supplier','location_issue','product_mismatch','other');
